overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a foggy night walk through Night City. The player moves from under a concrete overpass, ascends stairs to an elevated walkway, passes neon-lit storefronts and holographic billboards, and approaches a street intersection with police presence and passing traffic.

events.description: turns right from road toward concrete stairwell entrance

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass and turning toward a stairwell on the right side

notable_agents.action: standing near the stairwell entrance against the wall

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with thick support columns
two-lane road with double yellow lines running under the overpass
tall concrete retaining wall with horizontal orange safety stripes
opening in the wall leading to concrete stairs with overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive concrete highway overpass at night. The camera moves along an asphalt road with yellow dividing lines, passing scattered papers on the ground. A pedestrian stands near a stairwell entrance set into a concrete wall marked with orange safety stripes. The atmosphere is foggy and artificially lit by overhead lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with orange safety markings

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs steadily toward the upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with worn steps ascending upward
bright orange handrail running along the right side of the stairs
harsh artificial lighting fixtures mounted on the stairwell ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a stark concrete stairwell, transitioning from the underpass road to an upper level. The environment is enclosed and artificially lit, with orange safety stripes marking the walls and a bright orange handrail guiding the ascent. The space is empty except for the echoing footsteps of the player character.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway in heavy fog with distant palm trees

events.description: exits enclosed stairwell onto open elevated walkway with foggy visibility
emerging into foggy night air with distant neon lights becoming visible through haze

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway next to a tall industrial building wall

notable_agents.action: walking toward the camera through the fog on the elevated walkway

entered.detail: wet concrete pathway with reflective surface and orange safety barriers
tall dark industrial building wall with weathered texture running alongside the path
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy orange sky in the distance
thick orange-tinted fog obscuring the night sky and distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Exiting the stairwell, the scene opens onto an elevated walkway enveloped in thick orange fog. The wet concrete reflects the ambient light as the camera moves past a dark industrial building wall. In the distance, palm trees emerge from the haze, and a lone pedestrian walks toward the camera through the misty atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial elevated walkway with holographic billboards

events.description: passing large illuminated orange CALIENTE sign and entering dense commercial signage area

agents.ego_description: walking past bright neon advertisements and curved storefront facades

entered.detail: large bright orange neon sign spelling CALIENTE on building facade
massive holographic billboard displaying advertisements above the walkway
pink neon signage for MINNIE DAV'S visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The walkway curves through a dense commercial district saturated with neon light. A large orange CALIENTE sign glows intensely on the left, while holographic billboards float above the path. The fog diffuses the neon colors, creating a cyberpunk atmosphere with pink and orange reflections on the wet pavement. Palm trees fade into the fog behind as the camera advances toward more signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: street intersection with police presence and traffic lights

events.description: police car with flashing lights parked near the intersection ahead
black vehicle drives past on the street below the walkway

agents.ego_description: approaching street level crossing with traffic lights and observing police activity

notable_agents.action: police car parked with blue lights flashing near the intersection
sitting under umbrella at street vendor cart on the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright pink neon sign for MINNIE DAV'S store above street level
futuristic police vehicle with illuminated blue accents parked on street
large umbrella sheltering a street vendor cart with glowing items
tall traffic signal pole with illuminated lights
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on ground

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a street intersection dominated by the bright pink neon of MINNIE DAV'S. A police car with flashing blue lights sits parked near the crossing, while a street vendor sits under an umbrella to the left. The camera moves toward a crosswalk as a black vehicle drives past on the street below, and traffic lights control the sparse flow of vehicles in the foggy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadows of a concrete underpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated haze of a futuristic city intersection. It begins on an asphalt road beneath a massive highway overpass, moving past scattered debris and a pedestrian toward a stark concrete stairwell marked with orange safety stripes. As the camera ascends the stairs, the enclosed space opens onto an elevated walkway where thick orange fog swallows the distance and wet concrete reflects the ambient glow. The scene then shifts into a dense commercial district, curving past glowing holographic billboards and an intense orange Caliente sign that diffuses the surrounding mist into pink and orange hues. Finally, the path leads toward a bustling street intersection dominated by the bright pink neon of Minnie Dav's, passing a parked police car with flashing blue lights and a street vendor as traffic flows through the foggy night.
